data.name: All Aiursoft servers are sourced from Voxihost. We help clients land on Voxihost infrastructure.
data.value: All Aiursoft servers are hosted on Voxihost. We assist clients in deploying their services on Voxihost’s infrastructure.

data.name: Paving the Way for Your Business.
data.value: Paving the Way for Your Business.

data.name: Voxihost offers transparent, cost-effective cloud and generously sponsors Aiursoft's Open-source work.
data.value: Voxihost offers transparent, cost-effective cloud services and generously sponsors Aiursoft's open-source work.

data.name: With reliable cloud infrastructure, your business can grow reliably alongside Aiursoft.
data.value: With reliable cloud infrastructure, your business can grow reliably alongside Aiursoft.

data.name: With Voxihost, Aiursoft helps enterprises host Email, authentication, cloud drives, employee portals, monitoring, and AI.
data.value: With Voxihost, Aiursoft helps enterprises host email, authentication, cloud drives, employee portals, monitoring, and AI.
